findings.problem: The chapter's central horror lands with force when Nate realizes Dominic's signature is now reproducible by his own hand, but the closing then spends too many paragraphs re-proving the same thesis in fresh wording. After the operational turn that he cannot stop Eastbridge through generic delay, the chapter keeps circling workflow, administrative violence, and deadline language instead of exiting on the newly changed objective. That reads as thematic over-explanation and mild chapter sprawl rather than added dramatic payload.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten the closing beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:152 and ending after snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:194. Keep the practical turn in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:158 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:160, and keep one final deadline image from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:190 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:194, but cut or recombine the overlapping restatements at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:168 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:186 so the chapter exits once Nate's objective has changed.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised material replacing current snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:152 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:194 does three distinct jobs and no more: it shows Nate testing the naive delay fantasy, shows him concluding the project has too many active parts for passive sabotage, and ends on the concrete December 28 live-process deadline. Fail if, after that operational conclusion lands, later paragraphs merely restate the chapter's moral diagnosis in synonymous terms without adding a new decision, obstacle, or consequence.

findings.problem: The chapter leans too often on isolated one-sentence transition paragraphs built on the same 'He [past-tense verb]...' shape. A few of these beats help control the file-reading descent, but this many in one chapter starts to feel like an LLM cadence tic rather than intentional rhythmic variation, especially because several of them perform similar move-the-eye-forward work.
findings.rewrite_direction: Vary the transitions clustered around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:17, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:25, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:29, and later echoes at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:118, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:136, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:142. Fold some into adjacent paragraphs, replace some with sensory or interpretive pivots, and keep only the isolated beats that mark a genuinely sharper turn than simple page advancement.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised passages corresponding to current snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:17, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:21, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:25, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:29, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:45, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:118, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:136, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_07.md:142 no longer produce a run of more than two isolated one-sentence 'He [verb]' transition paragraphs serving the same function. Fail if the chapter still advances through four or more such beats in substantially the same form.

summary: Strong, continuity-clean discovery chapter with close-Nate interiority, style-bible-consistent voice, and a genuinely sickening signature/body-horror turn. It does not clear award, craft, or prose pass because the final third keeps re-proving an insight that has already landed, and the paragraph rhythm relies too often on the same short transition formula. Dialogue is sparse by design in this solitary scene, but the remembered lines and register handling remain character-true.
